sourceMovie.title: Norbit
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Norbit works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part III
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Norbit clicked for you, The Hangover Part III (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Norbit?
faq.answer: Try The Hangover Part III, Stuart Little, Shallow Hal—each shares DNA with Norbit while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Norbit?
faq.answer: Norbit (2007) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Norbit worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
